span.p: Bit Masking — Extract the k-th bit

span.p: Set the k-th bit: n | (1 << k)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Clear the k-th bit: n & ~(1 << k)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Toggle the k-th bit: n ^ (1 << k)
